title: Paris Olympics 2024: What is so unique about silver medal winner Turkish shooter Yusuf Dikec - Times of India
description: At the 2024 Paris Olympics, a 51-year-old Turkish shooter, Yusuf Dikec, captured global attention by winning a silver medal in the mixed team 10-meter
keywords: Yusuf Dikec,Turkish shooter,silver medal winner,Sevval Ilayda Tarhan,Paris Olympics 2024,Manu Bhaker,kim yeji
